scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @turnover/api" "npm run dev -w @turnover/web"
scripts.dev:mobile: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @turnover/api" "npm run dev:mobile -w @turnover/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @turnover/shared && npm run build -w @turnover/api && npm run build -w @turnover/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
